'''nodanaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:chainlike|chainlike]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-d-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:chainlike|chainlike]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| nodanaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:nodanithi|nodanithi]] || [[word:nodaniji|nodaniji]] || [[word:nodanishi|nodanishi]] || [[word:nodaniki|nodaniki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:nodanuthuthu|nodanuthuthu]] || [[word:nodanujuju|nodanujuju]] || [[word:nodanushushu|nodanushushu]] || [[word:nodanukuku|nodanukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:nodanuthu|nodanuthu]] || [[word:nodanuju|nodanuju]] || [[word:nodanushu|nodanushu]] || [[word:nodanuku|nodanuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:nodanufthuf|nodanufthuf]] || [[word:nodanufjuf|nodanufjuf]] || [[word:nodanufshuf|nodanufshuf]] || [[word:nodanufkuf|nodanufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:nodanethe|nodanethe]] || [[word:nodaneje|nodaneje]] || [[word:nodaneshe|nodaneshe]] || [[word:nodaneke|nodaneke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:nodanothotho|nodanothotho]] || [[word:nodanojojo|nodanojojo]] || [[word:nodanoshosho|nodanoshosho]] || [[word:nodanokoko|nodanokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:nodanotho|nodanotho]] || [[word:nodanojo|nodanojo]] || [[word:nodanosho|nodanosho]] || [[word:nodanoko|nodanoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:nodanofthof|nodanofthof]] || [[word:nodanofjof|nodanofjof]] || [[word:nodanofshof|nodanofshof]] || [[word:nodanofkof|nodanofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:nodanĂŻfthĂŻf|nodanĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:nodanĂŻfjĂŻf|nodanĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:nodanĂŻfshĂŻf|nodanĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:nodanĂŻfkĂŻf|nodanĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:nodanĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|nodanĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:nodanĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|nodanĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:nodanĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|nodanĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:nodanĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|nodanĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:nodanĂŻfthĂŻf|nodanĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:nodanĂŻfjĂŻf|nodanĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:nodanĂŻfshĂŻf|nodanĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:nodanĂŻfkĂŻf|nodanĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:nodanĂŻfthĂŻf|nodanĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:nodanĂŻfjĂŻf|nodanĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:nodanĂŻfshĂŻf|nodanĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:nodanĂŻfkĂŻf|nodanĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:nodanĂŠthĂŠ|nodanĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:nodanĂŠjĂŠ|nodanĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:nodanĂŠshĂŠ|nodanĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:nodanĂŠkĂŠ|nodanĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:nodanathatha|nodanathatha]] || [[word:nodanajaja|nodanajaja]] || [[word:nodanashasha|nodanashasha]] || [[word:nodanakaka|nodanakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:nodanatha|nodanatha]] || [[word:nodanaja|nodanaja]] || [[word:nodanasha|nodanasha]] || [[word:nodanaka|nodanaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:nodanafthaf|nodanafthaf]] || [[word:nodanafjaf|nodanafjaf]] || [[word:nodanafshaf|nodanafshaf]] || [[word:nodanafkaf|nodanafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:nodanasha|nodanasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:nodanshĂ«sha|nodanshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:nodanrosha|nodanrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:nodanmusha|nodanmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:nodanyasha|nodanyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gonodankshĂ«sha|gonodankshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gonodankrosha|gonodankrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonodankmusha|gonodankmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gonodankyasha|gonodankyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:nodadanasha|nodadanasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:nodadanshĂ«sha|nodadanshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:nodadanrosha|nodadanrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:nodadanmusha|nodadanmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:nodadanyasha|nodadanyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gonodadankshĂ«sha|gonodadankshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gonodadankrosha|gonodadankrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonodadankmusha|gonodadankmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gonodadankyasha|gonodadankyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:nedĂŠnasha|nedĂŠnasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:nedĂŠnshĂ«sha|nedĂŠnshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:nedĂŠnrosha|nedĂŠnrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:nedĂŠnmusha|nedĂŠnmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:nedĂŠnyasha|nedĂŠnyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gonedĂŠnkshĂ«sha|gonedĂŠnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gonedĂŠnkrosha|gonedĂŠnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonedĂŠnkmusha|gonedĂŠnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gonedĂŠnkyasha|gonedĂŠnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:nodfanasha|nodfanasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:nodfanshĂ«sha|nodfanshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:nodfanrosha|nodfanrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:nodfanmusha|nodfanmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:nodfanyasha|nodfanyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gonodfankshĂ«sha|gonodfankshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gonodfankrosha|gonodfankrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonodfankmusha|gonodfankmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gonodfankyasha|gonodfankyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|691fcb1}}
